name: github_start_agent_task
description: Start a new Copilot cloud agent task for a repository (POST /agents/repos/{owner}/{repo}/tasks). Public preview. Requires Copilot Business/Enterprise and fine-grained PAT or GitHub App user token with Agent tasks repository read and write. Required prompt; optional model, custom_agent, create_pull_request, base_ref, head_ref. Returns HTTP 201. See GitHub REST agent-tasks.
